description_long: This is a dining set consisting of a round plate, a spoon, a fork, and a knife, all featuring a coordinated design with light blue handles and accents. The plate is predominantly white with a blue rim and a small blue motif in the center, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The utensils have straight, cylindrical handles in blue with metallic heads, suggesting a lightweight and contemporary construction. The set appears to be made from ceramic or porcelain for the plate and stainless steel with plastic or resin for the utensils. The overall design is minimalistic, with smooth surfaces and no visible text or branding. The set is suitable for casual or everyday dining, likely intended for placement on a table or countertop.
description: A modern dining set with a white plate featuring blue accents, accompanied by a blue-handled spoon, fork, and knife. The set is sleek, minimalistic, and visually coordinated.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plate centered with the spoon on the left and the fork and knife on the right, all handles visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the circular shape of the plate and the full length of the utensils laid out horizontally.
description_view_2: Rear view with the plate in the center, the knife and fork on the left, and the spoon on the right, handles facing outward.
description_view_3: Back-top view showing the plate with the spoon below and the fork and knife above, emphasizing the utensil arrangement.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: A small blue motif is visible in the center of the plate; no other markings or inscriptions are present.
